mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rs_task ( task_code, image_id, task_type, task_name, status, priority, progress, retry_count, max_retry_count, params ) VALUES ( #{taskCode}, #{imageId}, #{taskType}, #{taskName}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{progress}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, CAST(NULLIF(#{params}, '') AS jsonb) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_code, image_id, task_type, task_name, status, progress, retry_count, max_retry_count, output_bucket, output_object_key, error_message, submitted_at, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rs_task WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE rs_task SET output_bucket = #{outputBucket}, output_object_key = #{outputObjectKey}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rs_task SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE rs_task SET status = #{status}, progress = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUCCESS' THEN 100 WHEN #{progress} IS NOT NULL THEN #{progress} ELSE progress END, output_object_key = CASE WHEN #{outputObjectKey} IS NOT NULL AND #{outputObjectKey} != '' THEN #{outputObjectKey} ELSE output_object_key END, error_message = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'FAILED' THEN #{errorMessage} WHEN #{status} = 'SUCCESS' THEN NULL ELSE error_message END, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RUNNING' THEN COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE started_at END, finished_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELED') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE finished_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}

UPDATE rs_task SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRYING')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rs_task WHERE image_id = #{imageId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING')
mapper.update: UPDATE rs_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = max_retry_count, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING')
